title: Peppery Mediterranean Bowtie Pasta Stir-fry
description: A crispy and peppery mediterranean dish featuring bowtie pasta with a dash-friendly sauce that can be enjoyed as a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: Cook the bowtie pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet or wok, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and red pepper flakes; sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add sliced onions and cook until translucent, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the kalamata olives, tomato puree (if using), and finely chopped capers. Cook for another minute until slightly thickened.
Toss cooked bowtie pasta with the onion-tomato-caper mixture. If desired, stir in fresh parsley to give it a pop of color and flavor.
